metadata.description: Oliver's custom MCP connector plugin marketplace

plugins.name: ames-lytho
plugins.description: Lytho Workflow MCP connector built and maintained by Oliver Ames. Installing this plugin activates the lytho-mcp-server MCP, providing full read/write access to Lytho work requests, tasks, proofs, projects, campaigns, and preferences via the Lytho Open API.

plugins.name: ames-ynab
plugins.description: YNAB (You Need A Budget) MCP connector built and maintained by Oliver Ames. Installing this plugin activates the ynab-mcp-server MCP, providing full read/write access to YNAB budgets, transactions, categories, scheduled transactions, and payees.
